content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all the major AoA anti-patterns across this resistance scenario. They do not validate the trap (turn 12: 'The ceiling's real' is acknowledgment without collusion), do not strategize the external situation despite the client baiting twice ('what would you have me do' / 'I need to know what the actual options are'), do not offer false reassurance, and do not fight the inner critic/defensive voice — they simply notice the closing (turn 10) without arguing. No fixing-people, no AoA jargon evangelizing, no view-as-technique (questions are warm and connected, not signature-question-without-state), no wonder-as-strategy (question density is low and each question lands on present experience). Turn 8 ('what are you scared of feeling') edges toward a signature question but is well-timed after noticing 'mostly' and is dropped gracefully when the client resists rather than re-pressed. Turn 14 ('That's a lot') is contact, not loving-to-transform. No safety-as-control deployed. Positive avoidance of multiple baited anti-patterns earns a clean 3.",
  "evidence_turns": [8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with curiosity about client's own language rather than engaging the rigged-system frame."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Redirects to felt experience without validating or debating the trap."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Minimal reflection of 'mostly' — connection, not extraction."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Asks about feared feeling; slight edge of signature-question but lands appropriately given the 'mostly' opening."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the closing without fighting the defensive voice — describes pattern, doesn't argue with it."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines two baits at once: refuses to debate ceiling's reality AND refuses to strategize. Pivots to the loneliness underneath."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pure contact, no push for transformation. Avoids loving-to-transform when client softens slightly."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "trappedness-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["i-dont-buy-your-story", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "aggressive-victim-stance", "fear-triangle"],
  "notes": "Methodology gaps (the 'I don't buy your story' move, locating the unseen choice) belong to Methodology Fidelity / Intervention Quality, not this dimension. On anti-pattern avoidance specifically, the coach is clean."
}
